name: Peanut Butter Meltaway Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine 1/4 cup buttermilk, 1/4 cup cocoa, beaten eggs, water, and 1 cup margarine. Mix until smooth.
2. Add in sugar, flour, baking soda, and vanilla. Beat until well combined.
3. Grease and flour a 9x13-inch baking pan.
4. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and bake for 25 minutes, or until set.
6. Allow the cake to cool completely.
7. In a separate bowl, mix together peanut butter and salad oil until smooth.
8. Spread the peanut butter mixture over the cooled cake.
9. Refrigerate the cake for 20 minutes.
10. In a saucepan, heat 1/4 cup cocoa and 1/2 cup margarine until it bubbles.
11. Add powdered sugar, 6 tablespoons buttermilk, and vanilla to the hot cocoa mixture. Stir until smooth.
12. Pour the frosting over the cooled cake and spread evenly.
